overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The player navigates a vehicle through multi-level urban streets featuring neon signage, elevated highways, and moderate traffic. Bright midday sunlight contrasts with vibrant artificial neon glow from advertisements and building facades, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street beneath elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: driving forward under elevated highway structures following a blue sedan at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass spanning across the road creating partial cover
small white cat-like ornamental figure sitting on the vehicle dashboard
tall cyberpunk-style buildings with glass facades and neon accent lighting
thick cylindrical columns supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a massive elevated highway system with concrete pillars lining the sides. The road is partially shaded by the overpass above while futuristic buildings with neon accents rise on the right. A blue sedan travels ahead in the same lane, and a small figurine sits on the dashboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open sunlit intersection with visible crosswalks
navigates right turn at intersection while pedestrians wait at crosswalk corners

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at a busy intersection, navigating around crosswalk markings and waiting pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at the corner waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: zebra-striped white crosswalk markings painted on the asphalt surface
ground floor commercial establishments with large display windows and signage
suspended traffic lights hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway into a bright sunlit intersection with clearly marked crosswalks. The vehicle turns right while pedestrians wait at the corners. Street-level shops line the right side, and the traffic signals hang overhead. The elevated highway structure recedes behind as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with storefronts and digital advertising

events.description: entering dense commercial district with prominent neon signage and holographic advertisements on building facades

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial street lined with shops, neon signs, and pedestrians on sidewalks while following traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sedan maintaining steady speed ahead in the traffic lane

entered.detail: bright pink and cyan neon signs advertising various businesses and products
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated colorful content
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a vibrant commercial corridor illuminated by bright neon signage and holographic advertisements. Storefronts line both sides at street level, and pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. An overhead pedestrian walkway spans the road ahead, while the blue sedan continues to lead the way through the district.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway entrance ramp with merging traffic and elevated structures

events.description: approaching highway on-ramp with elevated road structures and support columns becoming prominent
accelerating onto elevated highway ramp and merging with faster-moving traffic

agents.ego_description: accelerating up the highway entrance ramp and merging onto the elevated roadway system

notable_agents.action: silver sports car merging from the right lane onto the highway

entered.detail: curved elevated roadway entrance with concrete barriers and guardrails
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway infrastructure
giant digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from street level to an elevated highway system via a curving on-ramp. Massive concrete support columns line the left side while the road ascends. A silver sports car merges from the right as the vehicle accelerates to highway speed. Large digital billboards are visible on distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with sweeping curves and guardrails

events.description: navigating a sweeping left curve on the elevated highway at higher speed

agents.ego_description: following traffic flow through sweeping curves on the elevated highway system

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead navigating the highway curve

entered.detail: metal safety barrier with reflective strips along the elevated road edge
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon beyond the highway
highway direction signs suspended over the roadway

segments.scene_description: Cruising along the elevated highway through sweeping left curves. Metal guardrails line the right side of the road while the city skyline stretches out in the distance. The vehicle follows a white sedan through the curve, with support columns now visible further away to the left. Overhead signage indicates highway directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the shaded underbelly of a city's infrastructure to the open vistas of an elevated highway. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where neon-accented buildings rise beside the road and a blue sedan leads the way. As the vehicle emerges from the shadows into a bright sunlit intersection, the scene opens up to reveal street-level shops and pedestrians before shifting into a vibrant commercial corridor filled with holographic advertisements and overhead walkways. The camera then follows a curving on-ramp that ascends away from the street level, passing massive support columns as a silver sports car merges into the lane. Finally, the road levels out into a sweeping highway where the vehicle cruises past metal guardrails and overhead signage, with the expansive city skyline stretching out in the distance.
